'''âd-g-d''' ('''kadagad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cupboard|cupboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cupboard|cupboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-g-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadagad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidagad|thidagad]] || [[word:jidagad|jidagad]] || [[word:shidagad|shidagad]] || [[word:kidagad|kidagad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudagad|thuthudagad]] || [[word:jujudagad|jujudagad]] || [[word:shushudagad|shushudagad]] || [[word:kukudagad|kukudagad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudagad|thudagad]] || [[word:judagad|judagad]] || [[word:shudagad|shudagad]] || [[word:kudagad|kudagad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudagad|thudagad]] || [[word:judagad|judagad]] || [[word:shudagad|shudagad]] || [[word:kudagad|kudagad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedagad|thedagad]] || [[word:jedagad|jedagad]] || [[word:shedagad|shedagad]] || [[word:kedagad|kedagad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodagad|thothodagad]] || [[word:jojodagad|jojodagad]] || [[word:shoshodagad|shoshodagad]] || [[word:kokodagad|kokodagad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodagad|thodagad]] || [[word:jodagad|jodagad]] || [[word:shodagad|shodagad]] || [[word:kodagad|kodagad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodagad|thodagad]] || [[word:jodagad|jodagad]] || [[word:shodagad|shodagad]] || [[word:kodagad|kodagad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdagad|thĂŠdagad]] || [[word:jĂŠdagad|jĂŠdagad]] || [[word:shĂŠdagad|shĂŠdagad]] || [[word:kĂŠdagad|kĂŠdagad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadagad|thathadagad]] || [[word:jajadagad|jajadagad]] || [[word:shashadagad|shashadagad]] || [[word:kakadagad|kakadagad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadagad|thadagad]] || [[word:jadagad|jadagad]] || [[word:shadagad|shadagad]] || [[word:kadagad|kadagad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadagad|thadagad]] || [[word:jadagad|jadagad]] || [[word:shadagad|shadagad]] || [[word:kadagad|kadagad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadagad|shadagad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadagad|goshadagad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadagad|gokishadagad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadagadnĂŒ|shadagadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadagadnknĂŒ|goshadagadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadagadnĂŒ|gokishadagadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadagadshĂ«|shadagadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadagadnkshĂ«|goshadagadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadagadshĂ«|gokishadagadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadagadro|shadagadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadagadnkro|goshadagadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadagadro|gokishadagadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadagadmu|shadagadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadagadnkmu|goshadagadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadagadmu|gokishadagadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadagadsher|shadagadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadagadnksher|goshadagadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadagadsher|gokishadagadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadagadng|shadagadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadagadnkng|goshadagadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadagadng|gokishadagadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadagadya|shadagadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadagadnkya|goshadagadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadagadya|gokishadagadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadagadyam|shadagadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadagadnkyam|goshadagadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadagadyam|gokishadagadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadagadnĂŒshĂ«|shadagadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadagadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadagadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadagadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadagadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadagadnĂŒro|shadagadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadagadnknĂŒro|goshadagadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadagadnĂŒro|gokishadagadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadagadnĂŒmu|shadagadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadagadnknĂŒmu|goshadagadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadagadnĂŒmu|gokishadagadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadagadshĂ«nĂŒ|shadagadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadagadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadagadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadagadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadagadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadagadshĂ«ro|shadagadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadagadnkshĂ«ro|goshadagadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadagadshĂ«ro|gokishadagadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadagadshĂ«mu|shadagadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadagadnkshĂ«mu|goshadagadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadagadshĂ«mu|gokishadagadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadagadronĂŒ|shadagadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadagadnkronĂŒ|goshadagadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadagadronĂŒ|gokishadagadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadagadroshĂ«|shadagadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadagadnkroshĂ«|goshadagadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadagadroshĂ«|gokishadagadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadagadromu|shadagadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadagadnkromu|goshadagadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadagadromu|gokishadagadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadagadmunĂŒ|shadagadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadagadnkmunĂŒ|goshadagadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadagadmunĂŒ|gokishadagadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadagadmushĂ«|shadagadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadagadnkmushĂ«|goshadagadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadagadmushĂ«|gokishadagadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadagadmuro|shadagadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadagadnkmuro|goshadagadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadagadmuro|gokishadagadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
